title: Doff Flea Killer – 300ml Aerosol – Permethrin Flea Killer Dog Bed Spray – Targets Crawling Insects – Fleas, Ants, Cockroaches, Woodlice & Carpet Beetles – Indoors & Outdoors
features: POWERFUL FLEA & INSECT KILLER – Effectively eliminate fleas with Doff Flea Killer Aerosol. This ready-to-use flea spray tackles fleas and other crawling insects like cockroaches, woodlice and carpet beetles, killing pests on contact and preventing reinfestation in your home and pet beddings

EASY & VERSATILE APPLICATION – Spray this flea killer on surfaces, crevices and dog beds. The flea spray for home’s precision spray nozzle ensures thorough treatment in hard-to-reach areas, targeting high-risk zones to control infestations effectively and keep pets’ spaces bug-free

FAST-ACTING & RELIABLE – Powered by permethrin and tetramethrin, two highly effective, proven active ingredients that provide a rapid knockdown permethrin spray. It’s safe for families and pets when used as directed, offering reliable protection without excessive residue

COMPREHENSIVE INSECT DEFENCE – Formulated for quick action, this flea treatment ensures efficient results across a wide range of crawling insects, keeping your environment pest-free and clean. The 300ml aerosol delivers effective, targeted flea treatment for dogs for year-round protection

PET CONTROL EXPERTS – With decades of trusted experience, Doff products provide quality-crafted, dependable pet solutions. Proudly made in the UK, our pet controls range offers proven performance, helping to maintain a clean, safe and comfortable living space
